nasb.text: He said, “Go your way, Daniel, for these words are concealed and sealed up until the end time.

esv.text: He said, “Go your way, Daniel, for the words are shut up and sealed until the time of the end.

cnv.text: 他回答：“但以理啊！你只管去吧，因為這些話已經隱藏密封，直到末期。

ccb.text: 他说：“但以理啊，你走吧，因为这些事要保密，要被封起来，一直到末了。
